title: I need FPS
description: I need MORE OPTIMIZE modpack is a set of mods aimed at improving the performance of the game. It contains about 30 different mods that aim to increase FPS on weak computers.
body:
The Minecraft modpack I need MORE FPS is designed with the desire to optimize the game as much as possible, providing players with an improved gameplay without unnecessary performance problems. This modpack has collected a variety of modifications aimed at improving performance and improving the gaming experience. Here you will find tools to speed up the loading of the game world, optimize the use of computer resources, reduce CPU load and improve the overall stability of the game. Also, if you have low FPS, you can use that modpack to play Minecraft on a very weak PC.

Thanks to optimized algorithms and an improved game engine, players will be able to enjoy a smooth, carefree and high-quality gameplay. In addition, the modpack may include additional features such as an improved interface, bug fixes, additional settings and tools for comfortable interaction with the game. The main goal of this modpack is to make the gameplay more enjoyable, without crashes and lags, giving players the opportunity to fully immerse themselves in the fascinating world of the game without distractions.
